description_long: This is a modern, compact submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a distinctive angular design. The rifle features a prominent upper Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and a lower rail section for additional attachments. Its magazine is inserted at an angle in front of the trigger guard, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The stock is skeletonized and appears to be fixed or minimally adjustable, contributing to the lightweight appearance. The barrel is short and robust, with a small cylindrical muzzle device attached. The overall construction suggests a blend of polymer and metal components, typical of contemporary tactical firearms.
description: A compact, angular black rifle with a skeletonized stock, short barrel, and prominent accessory rails. It features an angled magazine and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, angled magazine, and upper/lower accessory rails.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features: skeletonized stock, angled magazine, and accessory rails.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the Picatinny rail and the overall flatness of the rifle's upper surface.
